zh.Nicaea,Nicaean Empire Now Iznik,Tur, (pr: 土耳其布爾薩易茲尼可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi於大約1179年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾時，她的父親Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi32歲，母親Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera30歲。她於1203年與Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1246年6月23日在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾卡倫博格享年68歲。

zh-hans.Nicaea,Nicaean Empire Now Iznik,Tur, (pr: 土耳其布爾薩易茲尼可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi于大约1179年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾时，她的父亲Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi32岁，母亲Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera30岁。她于1203年与Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1246年6月23日在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾卡倫博格享年68岁。

variants.name: Dorothy
meanings: English (Devon): from the female personal name Dorothy, Latin and Greek Dorothea, composed of Greek dōron ‘gift’ and theos ‘God’.

variants.name: Dora
meanings: Hungarian: from the female personal name Dóra, a short form of Dorottya, Hungarian form of Dorothy .
Indian (West Bengal) and Bangladeshi: Kayastha name of unexplained etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Angelina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian and Spanish (mainly Toledo): from the female personal name Angelina, a diminutive of Angela .

variants.name: Angela
meanings: Italian: from the personal name Angela, feminine form of Angelo .

West Indian (Dutch Caribbean): from the personal name Angela, feminine form of Angel (see Angel 1, compare 1 above). It is one of the surnames (compare Martina ) that reflect the partially mother-oriented name culture of the formerly enslaved people in the West Indies.

en.lifeSummary: When Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi was born about 1179, in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkiye, her father, Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi, was 32 and her mother, Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera, was 30. She married Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria in 1203. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 23 June 1246, in Kahlenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi est née environ 1179, à Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquie, son père, Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria en 1203. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 juin 1246, à Kahlenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi um 1179 in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi 32 und ihre Mutter Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera 30. Sie hat 1203 Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Juni 1246 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Kahlenberg, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi è nata il circa 1179 nel Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turchia, sua padre, Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria nel 1203. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 23 giugno 1246, nel Kahlenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.of Steiermark, Austria: オーストリアステイエルマーク

ja.Nicaea,Nicaean Empire Now Iznik,Tur, (pr: トルコブルサイズニク
ja.lifeSummary: Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-háziが約1179年にトルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-háziは32歳，母Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamateraは30歳であった。1203年にLeopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styriaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1246年6月23日にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンカhレンバーグで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi(이)가 대략 1179년 튀르키예 이스탠불 팻이h 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1203년 Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 6월 23일 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 카h렌버그에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi nasceu aproximadamente 1179, em Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria em 1203. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de junho de 1246, em Kahlenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi родилась около 1179 г. в местности истанбул, фатих, истанбул, Турция, её отцу по имени Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria в 1203 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 23 июня 1246 г. в местности кахленбирг, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi nació aproximadamente 1179, en Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, Alexios III. Bizánci császár Angelos-dinasztia Komnenos-házi, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Euphrosyne Doukaina Kamatera, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria en 1203. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de junio de 1246, en Kahlenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, a la edad de 68 años.
